text.message: Kenit mbayne 1 road w bteftah knoght
Bas l chabeb ma Elon bel future
mnekhod l ore w alla bi dabber?
khalas baleha.. mna3te chance lal zi
bibs haram kel mara 3am yetla3lak spot 3al sa7ra
ayre bbahlte halla2 la ntabahet eno bibs red
Poli zinbado yekhedlak port l ore
Pol law ma kel hal roads ken 3amar men se3a
ma ba3ref kif ana 3ende city w bala wala ore
ent nektele l da2 aslan lol
kent 7a es7ab men allen bas 7a ekhod menak hala
